message:
feat: sync dashboard with deployed version (trial picker, no auto-refresh)

Bring repo in sync with what's running on magic-kingdom:
- Multi-rep trial expand/collapse with per-trial sub-rows
- Trial picker pills on task detail page with URL routing
- Trial-aware URL pattern (?trial=hash)
- Remove auto-refresh setInterval
- CSS for trial rows, trial picker, rep toggle, partial status dot

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
